channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Two High School Students Killed in Basilan Highway Crash
item.description: On July 16, a tragic incident occurred on the Basilan highway where two high school students were fatally injured after their motorcycle collided with another vehicle. The accident happened when the a...

item.title: Trump's Plan to Replace Illegal Truck Drivers with Veterans Could Impact Indian Immigrants
item.description: President Donald Trump has announced plans to replace illegal immigrant truck drivers with American war veterans, a policy that could significantly impact Indian immigrants in the U.S. The decision fo...

item.title: Evacuation Orders Issued for Northwestern Ontario Communities Amid Wildfires
item.description: Wildfires continue to burn across northwestern Ontario, prompting another evacuation order for areas near Lac des Mille Lacs. Residents of Baril, Windigoostigwan lakes, and surrounding regions have be...

item.title: Violence Reported in Kenya's Ol Kalou By-Election Amid 2027 Election Concerns
item.description: The article details violent clashes during the Ol Kalou by-election, which serves as a prelude to Kenya's 2027 presidential elections. Masked attackers targeted polling stations, journalists, and vote...

item.title: Legendary West Indies Cricketer Sir Garfield Sobers Dies at 89
item.description: Sir Garfield Sobers, the iconic West Indian cricketer celebrated as the greatest all-rounder in history, has passed away at the age of 89. His death was announced by the West Indies Cricket Federation...

item.title: Nigerian Woman Delivers Quadruplets via IVF at 49
item.description: A 49-year-old Nigerian woman, Mrs. O, has become a first-time mother after delivering quadruplets through in-vitro fertilisation (IVF) at Redeemer's Health Village. The hospital hailed the birth as a ...

item.title: Protests in Alexandra Target Immigrant-Owned Businesses, Police Struggle to Control Crowd
item.description: Weekly protests by the March and March group in Alexandra have escalated, with demonstrators entering homes and businesses to demand identity documents from immigrants. Despite police warnings that th...

item.title: Racism in Football: Understanding Its Roots at the World Cup
item.description: The article discusses how racism persists in football, using the 2026 World Cup as a case study. It highlights comments by former player Bastian Schweinsteiger, who criticized African teams' style of ...

item.title: Gujranwala Courts Impose Strict Punishments on 164 Human Traffickers in Six Months
item.description: Courts in Gujranwala have significantly increased convictions against human traffickers, with 164 accused receiving strict punishments over the past six months. This marks a major success for the Fede...

item.title: White House Testosterone Policy and Iran War Reboot: Political Scandals and Military Strategies
item.description: The article critiques the Trump administration's controversial policies and political scandals. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has introduced mandatory testosterone screening for US troops over 30, fr...

item.title: Congress MP Shashi Tharoor Rescued from Stuck Elevator in Kerala Hotel
item.description: Congress leader Shashi Tharoor was briefly trapped inside an elevator at a hotel in Kerala following a sudden mechanical failure. The incident occurred during a routine visit, prompting immediate acti...

item.title: South African Dancers Triumph at Disney World, Claiming World Championship Titles
item.description: Two 14-year-old dancers from Knysna, Fiah-Bella Fredericks and Chioma Tagbo, have made history by becoming world champions at the Dance the World event in Walt Disney World. Selected through the Theat...

item.title: Kimi Antonelli leads Belgian Grand Prix practice as George Russell struggles with tyre issues
item.description: In the second practice session for the Belgian Grand Prix at Spa-Francorchamps, Kimi Antonelli secured the fastest lap, while his Mercedes teammate George Russell finished eighth, raising concerns abo...

item.title: E Rock criticises musicians cancelling gigs amid backlash, bakery owner condemns ITV The Voice staff for seeking free food
item.description: In a recent incident at the Super Bowl show, E Rock has publicly criticised musicians who have pulled out of their scheduled performances due to backlash. The artist's comments highlight the frustrati...

item.title: Labor's Shift Toward Wealth Taxes: A Decade of Evolution
item.description: The article discusses the Australian Labor Party's evolving stance on wealth taxation, highlighting how the party has moved away from its historical socialist roots. A decade after attempts to distanc...

item.title: Delhi HC denies interim bail to Al Falah chairman but allows limited custody parole for wife's medical needs
item.description: The Delhi High Court has denied interim bail to Jawad Ahmed Siddiqui, chairman of Al Falah University, who is facing two money laundering cases. Siddiqui sought bail citing his wife's critical health ...

item.title: Civic movement criticises prophet's assassination threat against leader
item.description: The civic movement March and March has condemned a prophecy by Zimbabwean prophet Dr Obey Tichafa Mukanhairi, who claimed civic movement leader Jacinta Ngobese-Zuma would be assassinated if she did no...

item.title: Benjamin Mkapa Hospital Funds Raise Over Sh2.2 Billion for Kidney and Bone Marrow Transplants
item.description: Benjamin Mkapa Hospital has successfully raised over Sh2.2 billion through a fundraising gala organized by the Women's Wing of Chama Cha Mapinduzi (UWT) to support life-saving kidney treatments and bo...

item.title: Sigabo: Gabo nahanap ang nawawalang motor dahil sa diskarte ni Tekla
item.description: Ang artikulong ito tungkol sa episode 20 ng palabas na Sigabo, kung saan ang karakter na Gabo ay nahanap ang nawawalang motor sa pamamagitan ng diskarte ni Tekla. Ang mga tauhan na nangunguna sa kuwen...

item.title: Protecting Pets from Wildfire Smoke: Essential Tips for Pet Owners
item.description: As wildfire smoke from Canada spreads across the northern United States, pet owners need to take proactive measures to safeguard their animals' health. The article outlines five critical strategies to...
